description: A provider's attestation that an item was given to a player. Lives on the provider's PDS.

main.description: Records that a provider granted an item to a specific recipient. The asset blob is not stored here — only the CID for integrity verification. Each give record is one item to one recipient.

recipient.description: DID of the player who received this item.

kind.description: Item kind. 'layer' for sprite-generator wearables (held/overlay are subtypes). For non-wearable inventory items, any descriptive string such as 'badge', 'potion', 'map', 'key', 'ticket', etc. Defaults to 'layer' if omitted.

category.description: Generator layer category for 'layer' items (e.g. 'tops', 'righthand'). Omit for 'inventory' items.

title.description: Human-readable display name for the item.

description.description: Flavour text or description of the item.

assetCid.description: CID of the canonical asset or icon PNG. Used to verify the player's copy is untampered.

iconCid.description: CID of the item's icon PNG, if distinct from the asset.

stats.description: Provider-defined properties or metadata for the item.

context.description: Origin description — where and how the item was earned (e.g. 'Avonlea Theatre popcorn vendor').
